title: No bounds check on latitude_e7/longitude_e7 values
description:
File: lichen/subsys/lichen/app_interface/hal_bridge.c:343-346

  .latitude_e7_valid = app->latitude_e7_valid,
  .latitude_e7 = app->latitude_e7,
  .longitude_e7_valid = app->longitude_e7_valid,
  .longitude_e7 = app->longitude_e7,

Geographic coordinates are passed through without validation. Valid ranges:
- latitude_e7: -900000000 to 900000000 (representing -90.0 to 90.0 degrees)
- longitude_e7: -1800000000 to 1800000000 (representing -180.0 to 180.0 degrees)

Invalid values could cause:
- Incorrect distance calculations
- Map rendering failures
- Security issues if coordinates are used for geofencing

The app->*_valid flags indicate presence but not correctness. Consider adding range validation before submitting to HAL.
close_reason: Fixed: Added bounds validation for latitude_e7 (-900000000 to 900000000) and longitude_e7 (-1800000000 to 1800000000) in submit_to_hal_as function when the respective _valid flags are set
